$comment: THE WALL — the gapless black-and-white grid of Caitlin's work.
These used to be hardcoded in index.html, which meant they were the one thing on the site
nobody could change without a developer. Now they're data, so she can swap any of them by
clicking it on the live page.
⚠️ THE COUNT MUST BE A MULTIPLE OF 6.
The grid is 3 across on mobile and 6 across on desktop. Any other count leaves a hole in
the last row — which is exactly the gap Caitlin asked us to remove. The build will refuse
to run with a bad count rather than silently ship a broken wall.
Unused and available: images/img2.webp (before/after), images/img3.webp, images/img9.webp
